title: University of Southampton Delhi Team Overview and Expertise
text: Meet our team. Our academic and professional team members combine local knowledge of Higher Education in India with international experience. University staff profiles can be searched or filtered by department or research interests (for academic faculty members). Departments include Accounting and Finance academics, Business academics, Computing academics, Economics academics, Professional staff, and Senior leadership. Research Interests encompass diverse areas such as Advanced Threat Detection & Response, Agricultural Economics, AI for social good, Behavioural Finance, Biomedical signal acquisition, processing, and analysis, Board gender diversity, Career Management & Sustainable Careers, Corporate finance, Cyber Threat intelligence, Digital health, Diversity, Equality & Inclusion, ESG finance, Ethical data science, Financial inclusion, Flexible Work, Information Security & Privacy, Malware Analysis, and Organisational Behaviour.
summary: UoSD introduces its academic and professional team, blending local and international expertise. Profiles can be filtered by department or research interests.

title: Dr Aparna Pasumarthy: Careers, Leadership, and Organisational Behaviour Expert
text: Dr Aparna Pasumarthy is an interdisciplinary researcher and educator, specializing in careers, leadership, and organizational behaviour. She previously taught at Queen Mary, University of London, and is an Associate Fellow of the Higher Education Academy. Her research focuses on the careers of professional men and women in India, especially within multinational corporations. Dr Pasumarthy holds a PhD in Business and Management from Queen Mary, University of London. She has presented her research at major international conferences and is committed to promoting social justice, inclusion, and sustainability in academia and organisational environments. Research Interests: Career Management & Sustainable Careers Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Ethical Decision Making Flexible Work Leaders and Leadership Development Organisational Behaviour.
summary: Dr Aparna Pasumarthy, an interdisciplinary researcher and educator, specializes in careers, leadership, and organizational behaviour, particularly in Indian multinational corporations. She holds a PhD from Queen Mary, University of London.

title: Dr Chitrakalpa Sen: Head of Economics, Sustainable Finance Expert
text: Dr Chitrakalpa Sen is Head of Economics at the University of Southampton Delhi. He holds a PhD in Economics from the West Bengal University of Technology, following an MSc and BSc (H) in Economics from the University of Calcutta. His research lies at the intersection of sustainable finance, ESG investing, and financial market dynamics, with particular expertise in volatility modelling, regime switching, and convergence in emerging economies. Chitrakalpa has published widely in leading international journals such as Journal of Economic Surveys, Energy Economics, Resources Policy and the Journal of Cleaner Production, and his work continues to shape debates on the resilience of green investments and the role of financial markets in sustainable growth. Research Interests: Convergence and growth dynamics in emerging economies ESG finance and sustainable investing Financial market complexity and behavioural dynamics Volatility modelling, regime-switching, and higher-order moment connectedness.
summary: Dr Chitrakalpa Sen, Head of Economics at UoSD, specializes in sustainable finance, ESG investing, and financial market dynamics, with a PhD from West Bengal University of Technology. He publishes widely in leading international journals.

title: Dr Mohammed Anam Akhtar: Head of Business Education and Finance Expert
text: Dr Mohammed Anam Akhtar is Head of Business Education at University of Southampton Delhi, bringing over a decade of distinguished academic, leadership, and industry experience to the role. He has previously served as Assistant Professor of Accounting and Finance and BBA program chair at IMT Dubai, contributed to ACCA program accreditation, and held teaching and consultancy positions at Curtin University (Dubai). Dr Akhtar holds a PhD in Management from NIT India, is a Certified Management and Business Educator (CMBE, UK), and is UGC-NET qualified. His wide-ranging expertise ensures academic rigour and innovation in business programs at the University, enriching the student experience with world-class learning and strong industry engagement. Research Interests: Behavioural Finance Financial inclusion Financial Reporting Financial wellbeing & Financial capability.
summary: Dr Mohammed Anam Akhtar, Head of Business Education at UoSD, brings over a decade of academic, leadership, and industry experience, focusing on business programs. He holds a PhD in Management.

title: Dr Nalini Sharan: Leading Student Experience and Campus Life
text: Dr Nalini Sharan leads the Student Experience portfolio at University of Southampton Delhi, bringing nearly two decades of leadership in higher education, student affairs, and strategic engagement. She is responsible for shaping a student-first culture that fosters wellbeing, inclusion, global awareness, and a vibrant campus life.
summary: Dr Nalini Sharan, with two decades of experience, leads Student Experience at UoSD, fostering student wellbeing, inclusion, global awareness, and a vibrant campus life.

title: Dr Nitish Gupta: Head of Business, Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise
text: Dr Nitish Gupta joined University of Southampton Delhi in August 2025 as Head of Business (Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise) and as a Lecturer in Business. He brings a proven track record in research, teaching, product innovation leadership and digital transformation to the campus.
summary: Dr Nitish Gupta joined UoSD in August 2025 as Head of Business (Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise) and Lecturer, bringing expertise in research, teaching, product innovation, and digital transformation.

title: Dr Rajesh Yadav: Cybersecurity Expert and Senior Tutor
text: Dr Rajesh Yadav is a seasoned educator with over 20 years of experience in creating innovative and engaging learning environments. Specializing in Cybersecurity, Cyber Threat Intelligence, Digital Forensics, Malware Analysis, Threat Detection, and Ethical Hacking, he combines hands-on experiential teaching with curriculum design to enhance critical thinking and problem-solving skills. He holds a BE, MTech, and PhD in Computer Science and Engineering and has contributed to both national and international academic institutions. He serves as a Lecturer and Senior Tutor at the University of Southampton Delhi, having previously held diverse academic roles across multiple institutions. Dr Yadav’s teaching excellence and contributions to the cybersecurity domain have been recognized with the Excellence in Teaching Award from the University of Southampton Malaysia and the International Educational Achievements Award for his outstanding contributions to the Cybersecurity domain. Research Interests: Advanced Threat Detection & Response Cyber Threat intelligence Information Security & Privacy Malware Analysis Threat Hunting.
summary: Dr Rajesh Yadav is a Lecturer and Senior Tutor at UoSD with over two decades of experience, specializing in cybersecurity, digital forensics, and threat detection. He holds multiple degrees in Computer Science and Engineering.
entities: PhD in Computer Science and Engineering

title: How to Meet the University of Southampton Delhi Team
text: You might also want to know How can I meet your team? You can meet us online, and in a selection of major cities in India. You can see when and where, by visiting the Events area of our website. When event tickets are available, you will be able to book a physical event, or to register for an on online session, from the event page. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page.
summary: UoSD team members can be met online or in major Indian cities. Event and campus tour booking details are found on the website's Events page.
